title: Capybara totem
description: So, i made a totem with a real life capybara image. I Didn't change the sound tho, this is the next thing that imma do.
body:
# Capybara

This is a totem texture pack, with a totem being replaced with a real life capybara image.

made by @defnotwhiff <3

discord: @defnotwhiff.

PLEASE DOWNLOAD THIS PACK I NEED MONEY. i aint kidding im broke
